content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-indian-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

A honeymoon is exceptional for newlywed couples – it is a celebration of their identity as a married couple. The memories they will be making during this vacation will stay with them for a lifetime. And if you’re looking to make your romantic escapade extra special, visit us to choose from our array of Himachal honeymoon packages. We’ve curated some of the best packages to suit different budgets and travel preferences.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Is Himachal Ideal for Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

Himachal is a great honeymoon destination thanks to the magnificent environment and pleasant weather. The thriving green valleys and cold mountains make it perfect for honeymooners. From Manali and Kasol to Shimla and Kulu and Dharamsala, there are plenty of tourist destinations worth visiting in Himachal.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19405″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Tips To Make Your Himachal Honeymoon Extra Special” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Himachal Pradesh is a genuinely exclusive and intimate getaway for any season. But you must remember a few things to enjoy a stress-free vacation. We’ve listed a few for you:

  • Carry a printout of the detailed itinerary provided to you.
  • Irrespective of the season you travel, carry warm clothes – the climate here ranges from cold to very cold and freezing cold.
  • Many destinations are off-beat and not well connected – remember to carry enough cash.
  • Many famous bazaars are expensive – check with your local guide for off-beat bazaars where the locals shop.
  • Traveling in the off-season is ideal if you’re looking for affordable Himachal honeymoon packages – but check the weather before booking.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How Much Does a Himachal Honeymoon Package Cost?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Most honeymooners prefer to buy destination-based packages like the Manali honeymoon tour or Shimla tour package. At ATW Travels, we’ve put together a Himachal honeymoon tour package that includes major tourist destinations. Depending on the itinerary and number of days, the package cost could vary from INR 22,999 to INR 53,999.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646218980753{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

+91 9693339999

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646218968202{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Packages

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are the Popular Tourist Destinations in Himachal?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

From beautiful plains and ancient shrines to a vibrant culture and incredible food, Himachal has something to offer everyone. Whether you’re an adventure lover, a solivagant, or a newlywed – the state has tourist destinations for all vacationers. Below, we’ve listed some popular attractions:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Shimla” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The Queen of Hill Stations, Shimla, is an exceptionally popular honeymooning site. It is considered the best honeymoon destination with major attractions like Green Valley, Jakhu Temple, Scandal Point, The Mall, Annandale, Shimla Heritage Museum.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19406″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Manali” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Manali is famous for its beautiful views, great alleys, and the romantic experiences it has to offer to newlyweds. Some popular spots in Manali include Solang Valley, Rohtang Pass, Bhrigu Lake, Hidimba Devi Temple, Beas Kund, and Van Vihar National Park.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Dalhousie” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Dalhousie is a romantic and beautiful place that stretches across the five hills of the Dhauladhar Ranges. It has glistening mountains, pine-covered valleys, tranquil outskirts, dense views, and pleasant weather. Chamera Lake, Sach Pass, Dainkund Peak, Ganji Pahari are some popular locations in Dalhousie.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Kasauli” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Kasauli is a quaint little town that sets the perfect mood for a romantic getaway. Kasauli’s unspoiled nature, cool climate, and ambiance make it a unique place for newlyweds. Some of the popular attractions in Kasauli include Sunset Point, Monkey Point, and Gilbert Trail.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19407″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Chamba” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Chamba is an ancient town located at the banks of river Ravi. It is blessed with beautiful vistas, a pleasant climate, and primeval lakes. It is also famous for its ancient temples, monuments, and handicrafts. Some of the popular attractions in Chamba include The Igloo Nature Park, Shipki La, and Kinnaur Kailash.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Is the Best Time to Visit Himachal?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Himachal Pradesh is beautiful and vibrant across the year. But some seasons stand out in terms of climate, activities, and package prices. October to February are winter months and ideal if you’d like to experience snow or indulge in winter sports. The monsoon lasts from July to September and is the best time for affordable Himachal honeymoon packages. But many places are out of bounds because of landslides and heavy rain. Himachal experiences summer from March to June- these months are ideal for adventure activities like trekking, kayaking, hot air ballooning, and white-water rafting. May to June is peak season, with thousands of domestic and international tourists flocking to the state to escape from the sweltering heat. Naturally, Himachal honeymoon packages are costly during this season.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Makes Our Himachal Honeymoon Tour Packages the Best?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

ATW Travels is a trusted and licensed travel agency that has been curating domestic and international tour packages since 1968. We offer tailormade packages that meet different budgets, travel requirements, and lifestyles. Whether you are looking for budget-friendly Himachal honeymoon packages or the best vacation experience that money can buy – we can plan one for you. We are committed to excellence and quality service.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19408″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are the Best Places to Visit in Himachal for Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Several romantic destinations make Himachal an ideal place for a honeymoon. We’ve listed some of the best below:

  • Dharamshala
  • Malana
  • Mashobra
  • Chitkul
  • Solano Valley
  • Nahan
  • Kangra
  • Kalpa
  • Barot
  • Shoja
  • Parwanoo
  • Rumsu
  • Losar
  • Tosh

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are the Best Hotels and Resorts to Stay in Himachal for Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Following is the list of places that you can choose to stay while enjoying our Himachal honeymoon packages:

  • Hotel Batseri Sangla (Kinnaur)
  • Amritara The Chateau (Kasauli)
  • Regenta Resort And Spa Mashobra (Shimla)
  • The Anantmaya Resort (Manali)
  • Woodays Resort (Shimla)
  • Fortune Park Dalhousie (Dalhousie)
  • WelcomHeritage Urvashi’s Retreat (Manali)
  • Golden Fern Resort (Shimla)
  • Ramada by Wyndham Kasauli (Kasauli)
  • The Chalets Naldehra (Shimla)

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_empty_space height=”20px” css=”.vc_custom_1646648038549{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

FAQs about Himachal Honeymoon

What Is the Best Time to Honeymoon in Himachal?
Himachal is crowded at the peak of Indian summer, i.e., in May and June. The best season to visit Himachal depends on the activities you’d like to enjoy. For instance, if you’d like to experience snow, consider visiting from December to February. Monsoon isn’t ideal, although some places like Spiti and Kasauli retain their charm. And if you’d like to experience the beauty of this place, consider visiting during the summer, i.e., from March to June.
How Many Days Are Enough for The Himachal Trip?
If you’d like to visit all the popular destinations, choose from our week-long Himachal honeymoon packages.
Is Himachal Safe for Honeymoon Couples?
Whether you are single or a couple, Himachal is a safe destination for everyone. However, we request you to stay away from souvenir shops as many of them sell overpriced stuff. Make sure you stick to your local guide’s instructions.
How Can I Reach Himachal?
The fastest way to travel to Himachal Pradesh is by the air route.
How Can I Travel Within Himachal?
It’s best to rent a private taxi or make our arrangements as the state isn’t well connected by trains or road.
What Are the Visa Requirements for International Travelers Visiting Himachal?
Foreigners must have a valid one-month tourist visa.
